definition: The six sense fields through which contact and cognition occur.
notes: The project prefers sense field because it reads more naturally than sense base while still retaining the analytical structure of the term. In dependent origination contexts, the plural force is often strongly implied even when the compound appears as a doctrinal link.

context_rules.context: In most doctrinal and dependent-origination contexts
When the sixfold structure needs to be explicit in prose
context_rules.notes: Use when the singular English phrase would hide the doctrinal count.

example_phrases.translation: with sense field as condition, contact

example_phrases.notes: Useful for showing how the broader āyatana family works.
